# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default # Replace with the namespace where your microservices are deployed
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service # Apply this policy to services with the label 'app: my-service'. Adjust or broaden as needed.
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        # Allow requests from the 'product-viewer' service account
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/product-viewer"] # Update 'default' to your namespace and 'product-viewer' to your SA name
    to:
    - operation:
        # Allow GET requests to product-related paths
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/products", "/api/v1/products/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        # Allow requests from the 'product-admin' service account
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/product-admin"] # Update 'default' to your namespace and 'product-admin' to your SA name
    to:
    - operation:
        # Allow POST, PUT, DELETE for managing products
        methods: ["POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/products", "/api/v1/products/*"]
    - operation:
        # Also allow GET for product-admin
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/products", "/api/v1/products/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        # Allow requests from the 'metrics-collector' service account
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/metrics-collector"] # Update 'default' to your namespace and 'metrics-collector' to your SA name
    to:
    - operation:
        # Allow GET requests to the metrics endpoint
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/metrics", "/probe"]
  - from:
    - source:
        # Allow traffic from internal Istio components for health checks etc.
        # This is a common practice to avoid blocking Istio's own operations.
        # It allows the Istio ingress gateway and other control plane components.
        namespaces: ["istio-system"] # Adjust if your Istio control plane is in a different namespace
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/*"] # Allow GET to all paths for Istio components (e.g., health checks)
